title: angraecum coriaceum
intro: Angraecum coriaceum, also known as the 'leather-flowered angraecum', is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Angraecum coriaceum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a tea or infusion, made by steeping the roots and leaves in hot water, or as a decoction by boiling the roots and leaves in water.
